name: AEVAL: From Anecdotal to Deterministic Testing for Agentic Skill Workflows
summary: arXiv:2607.16345v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Modern agentic systems increasingly rely on skills: installable packages of natural language and code that teach an LLM agent to perform a...
description: arXiv:2607.16345v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Modern agentic systems increasingly rely on skills: installable packages of natural language and code that teach an LLM agent to perform a domain task. As skill repositories grow, developers need automated quality signals on every change, yet evaluation today is largely anecdotal: a developer asks an agent to "try the skill," watches a d...
author: Tejas Singh Anand, Yuet Ying Christina Wang, Wanting Jiang, Steve Masson, Tian Zheng, Bingjie Zhou
